summary: Classified the hydrated open candidates only. #65309 remains the best live canonical Active Memory direct-chat latency/reliability tracker; #66804 and #69182 are related but carry distinct remaining follow-up scopes, so no close/comment/label mutation is planned.

actions.reason: #65309 is open, hydrated, broad, and already framed by ClawSweeper as the canonical Active Memory direct-chat latency/reliability tracker unless maintainers intentionally split it.
#66804 is in the same Active Memory timeout family as #65309, but it has a distinct provider/fallback scope that should remain open unless maintainers intentionally consolidate it.

#69182 overlaps #65309 but is a narrower first-output latency/product-semantics follow-up with explicit keep-open guidance in the hydrated artifact, so closing it as a duplicate is not high confidence.
